children.text: Visit Central PA's Kosher Mart in Founder's Way serving Glatt Kosher Meat and Pareve prepared under rabbinic supervision.
Come check out our signature Crabfries or Crabby Sweets, and enjoy a specialty burger or some chicken cutlets while you're there!
Grab some of our famous Crabfries, a Philly cheese steak, chicken cutlets, or a crab pretzel at our location on The Boardwalk!

Cool off with an ice cold ICEE or grab soft Bavarian pretzel, or cinnamon-sugar churro!

Sponsored by:

Grab a cold bottle of your favorite beverage to go with your hot dog or pretzel.

Sponsored by:

Escape the summer heat with a sweet treat! Top your soft-serve ice cream with sprinkles or dip it in chocolate– any way you choose to enjoy it, it's sure to be tasty!

Sponsored by:
